title: Emitever 6703 Double Sided Tape Heavy Duty - 20mm x 5.5m - Acrylic Foam Strong Adhesive Temperature Resistance Waterproof, For Automotive Bonding, Mounting, Fixing, Decorating, Office, Grey
features: Strong Adhesion of Multiple Surfaces: 5.5m x 20mm x 1.1mm (18ft x 0.78inch x 0.04inch). The strong double-sided adhesive tape has excellent initial and lasting adhesion on metal, plastic and glass surfaces. Depending on the surface material, it can withstand a force of about 14-28N/cm, which is suitable for the firm fixation of nameplates, light strips, panels, boxes, etc.

Extreme Environment Resistance: It can be used indoors and outdoors. This double-sided tape can withstand high temperatures up to 200°C and low temperatures of -45°C, and has excellent moisture resistance and UV aging resistance, ensuring stable performance in harsh environments or long-term outdoor use, and is not easy to fall off or fail.

Efficient Foam Structure: The strong tape uses a 1.1mm thick gray acrylic foam substrate, which has both an adhesive layer and a support layer, effectively resisting static shear forces while providing a buffering and sealing effect.

Easy to Peel Off Without Leaving Traces: The PE-coated release paper is designed to be easy to peel off by hand; in addition, no residual adhesive traces will be left when the tape is removed, keeping the surface clean.

Wide Range of Applications: No nails, no liquid adhesives, double-sided foam tape is suitable for home decoration, industrial fixation, advertising installation, car repair, electronic equipment assembly and other scenarios, meeting the bonding and installation needs of different fields, with good practicality.
description: Product Description Product Features: • Higher static sheer and Higher holding power • Good bonding on various substrates • Good temperature resistance and aging performance • Excellent repulsion resistance • IPX7 Previous page Next page Multiple Applications Example mounting applications include but are not limited to: • Decorative glass panel mounting • Plastic panel mounting • Nameplate and parts mounting • TV back panel mounting Packaging Update Notice We have transitioned to using cardboard boxes for packaging. During this transition period, you may receive either type of packaging (plastic bags or cardboard boxes). The product quality remains unchanged. Thank you for your understanding.
